description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.title: Free-time activities
tasks.prompt: You see this announcement on an English-language website.||Articles wanted!||Free-time activities||What activities can young people do in their free time where you live?||What new activity would you like to try?||Write your article.
tasks.modelAnswer: Free-time activities in my town||There are several things young people can do in their free time where I live. Many teenagers play football in the park, go swimming at the sports centre or meet friends in cafés. At weekends, the cinema is also very popular, especially when a new film comes out.||I usually enjoy playing basketball with my friends because it helps me relax after school. However, I would like to try photography because there are many beautiful places near my town.||I think free-time activities are important because they help young people make friends and feel less stressed.

tasks.title: Story
tasks.prompt: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.||Your story must begin with this sentence:||As I came out of the supermarket, I saw someone I had wanted to meet for a long time.||Write your story.
tasks.startingSentence: As I came out of the supermarket, I saw someone I had wanted to meet for a long time.
tasks.modelAnswer: As I came out of the supermarket, I saw someone I had wanted to meet for a long time. It was my favourite singer, standing near the entrance with two bags of shopping. I was so surprised that I almost dropped my phone.||At first, I was too shy to speak, but then she smiled and asked me where the bus stop was. I showed her the way and told her I loved her music.||She thanked me and signed my notebook before leaving. When I got home, nobody believed my story until I showed them the autograph.
